entries.title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
entries.snippet: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

entries.title: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
entries.snippet: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

entries.title: Western Union launches stablecoin card
entries.snippet: Western Union has launched its stablecoin wallet and card in partnership with Visa and Rain.

entries.title: UK parliamentary group launches probe into crypto sector's banking challenges
entries.snippet: This comes weeks after the publication of the UK’s new crypto regulatory framework, set to take effect in October 2027.

entries.title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027
entries.snippet: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

entries.title: Visa Bets the Future of Money Still Needs an Operator
entries.snippet: Stablecoins were supposed to make payment networks less necessary. Visa’s new stablecoin platform, introduced Thursday (July 16), suggests a messier outcome. The move comes on the heels of Visa’s June announcement that it had joined a 140-plus member Open Standard consortium to launch Open USD (OUSD
entries.tweet_text: @Visa Bets the Future of Money Still Needs an Operator

entries.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
entries.snippet: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

entries.title: Brazilian Securities Watchdog Takes Closer Look at Tokenization
entries.snippet: Brazil’s securities regulator has established a working group to explore tokenized securities. This working group, the Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM) announced Friday (July 17), will draft an experimental framework that examines the registration, custody, trading and settlement of tokenized s

entries.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
entries.snippet: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

entries.title: Stablecoin infrastructure startup Cyclops raises $20 million
entries.snippet: Cyclops announced that it has raised a $20M Series A led by Nava Ventures with participation from Castle Island Ventures, Coinbase Ventures, Circle, Lasagna Ventures and Global PayTech Ventures, helmed by Javier Perez, former President of Mastercard and founding investor in Adyen.

entries.title: Circle became a federal trust bank – now lenders warn stablecoins projected to drain $500 billion
entries.snippet: Circle became a federal trust bank – now lenders warn stablecoins is projected to drain $500 billion CryptoRank

entries.title: CFTC collateral rule change could boost tokenized MMF
entries.snippet: This week the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) finalized a rule change for margin for uncleared swaps, which expands the range of money market funds (MMFs) that can be used as initial margin. MMFs were already eligible as collateral, provided they only invested in cash and government secu
entries.tweet_text: CFTC collateral rule change could boost tokenized MMF

entries.title: This Week in Stablecoins: TradFi Doesn't Want DeFi. It Wants Blockchain
entries.snippet: The most important digital asset story this week was not the price of bitcoin, the launch of another cryptocurrency fund or even the continued expansion of stablecoins. It was the widening gap between the parts of crypto that traditional finance wants to preserve and the parts it intends to remove.

entries.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
entries.snippet: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.
entries.tweet_text: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval

entries.title: Crypto exchange Bybit launches in Indonesia after NOBI acquisition
entries.snippet: The launch gives Bybit a locally operated platform in one of Asia’s largest crypto markets, home to more than 21 million crypto exchange users.

entries.title: Injective files for SEC transfer agent registration to bring securities ownership records onchain
entries.snippet: The company said the filing would create a regulated pathway for maintaining ownership records for tokenized securities onchain.

entries.title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price launches first actively managed multi-token crypto ETF
entries.snippet: T. Rowe Price's TKNZ Active Crypto ETF began trading Thursday after the firm filed for the product in October.
entries.tweet_text: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price launches first actively managed multi-token crypto ETF

entries.title: Fireblocks Integrates Circle Payment Rails Into Its Platform
entries.snippet: Circle’s Gateway and Circle Payments Network (CPN) are now natively accessible within Fireblocks’ stablecoin infrastructure, Fireblocks said in a Thursday (June 16) blog post. Gateway gives Fireblocks customers access to a USDC Virtual Wallet that aggregates balances across supported chains into a s

entries.title: Visa launching internal stablecoin platform for clients that provides access to OUSD
entries.snippet: Open Standard's stablecoin is expected to become a major competitor to Circle's USDC, the dominant stablecoin in the U.S.
entries.tweet_text: @Visa launching internal stablecoin platform for clients that provides access to OUSD

entries.title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
entries.snippet: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.
entries.tweet_text: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure

entries.title: Tokenized stocks market cap gains to record $2.3B
entries.snippet: The market capitalization of tokenized stocks rose to a record $2.3 billion, as investors sought exposure to the growing list of tokenized equity products launched by cryptocurrency exchanges.

entries.title: AI & stablecoins: PayPal fits a gap in Stripe's horizontal integration strategy
entries.snippet: Stripe is partnering with private equity firm Advent International to make a joint offer for PayPal at $60.50 per share, valuing the company at more than $53 billion, according to a Reuters report. This represents a 28% premium on PayPal’s stock price, with each of the companies taking an equal stak
entries.tweet_text: AI & stablecoins: PayPal fits a gap in @stripe's horizontal integration strategy

entries.title: Benchmark says Securitize investors should 'strip out the noise' after post-SPAC selloff
entries.snippet: Separately, Securitize announced a partnership with Cantor Fitzgerald to support blockchain-based IPOs and secondary offerings.

entries.title: BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows
entries.snippet: The firm seeks to offer tokenized long-term investments like "Treasury funds, iShares ETFs, and even private markets."
entries.tweet_text: @BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows

entries.title: Crypto clearinghouse Glacis Labs raises $6.8 million seed to expand ZeroDelta platform
entries.snippet: Glacis aims to expand ZeroDelta, its multichain clearing platform for stablecoins, into tokenized securities and foreign exchange over time.

entries.title: Bull markets everywhere: Bitwise says crypto equities beat every major asset class but emerging markets in H1 2026
entries.snippet: Crypto assets fell 36% while crypto equities gained 23% in the first half of the year, with tokenized RWAs hitting a record $33 billion in Q2.

entries.title: DTCC begins first tokenized stock and Treasury production trades involving JPMorgan, BlackRock and Goldman
entries.snippet: JPMorgan will tokenize part of its Invesco QQQ Trust holdings held at DTCC, while Microsoft, Circle, and SPY shares will also be tokenized.
entries.tweet_text: DTCC begins first tokenized stock and Treasury production trades involving @jpmorgan, BlackRock and Goldman

entries.title: Tokenization startup Tradable plans to bring $1 billion worth of private credit assets to Stellar
entries.snippet: Tokenization startup Tradable plans to bring $1 billion worth of private credit assets to Stellar The Block

entries.title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
entries.snippet: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.
entries.tweet_text: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules

entries.title: US turns stablecoin issuer Tether into a financial weapon against Iran, freezing nearly $500 million
entries.snippet: US turns stablecoin issuer Tether into a financial weapon against Iran, freezing nearly $500 million CryptoRank
entries.tweet_text: US turns stablecoin issuer @Tether_to into a financial weapon against Iran, freezing nearly $500 million

entries.title: Circle clashed with Tether-backed fund over market manipulation concerns
entries.snippet: New filings detail long-running legal battle between Heka Funds and the $73bn stablecoin group

entries.title: Banks Unveil Blockchain Network as Stablecoin Payments Reach $33 Trillion
entries.snippet: Banks Unveil Blockchain Network as Stablecoin Payments Reach $33 Trillion Yahoo Finance
entries.tweet_text: Banks Unveil Blockchain Network as Stablecoin Payments Reach $33 Trillion

entries.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
entries.snippet: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

entries.title: Wall Street turns cautious on Circle as analysts warn USDC economics face mounting pressure
entries.snippet: Mizuho downgraded the stock and JPMorgan lowered earnings estimates, citing concerns that USDC is coming under pressure.

entries.title: US-UK transatlantic taskforce unveils digital asset roadmap promoting stablecoin innovation
entries.snippet: The U.S. and UK are deepening cooperation on digital assets, particularly for stablecoins and tokenized assets.

entries.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
entries.tweet_text: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets

entries.title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
entries.snippet: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.
entries.tweet_text: JCB signs @circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan

entries.title: For pension funds, tokenization's real play is balance-sheet management, Fidelity's Lai says
Emirates NBD goes live on Partior DLT settlement network
entries.snippet: Emirates NBD announced it is live on the Partior network, the DLT based clearing and settlement network for cross border payments, making it the first bank in the MENAT region on the network. Partior pre dates the BIS Project Agorá and has some similarities in that it uses blockchain to expedite cor
entries.tweet_text: Emirates NBD goes live on Partior DLT settlement network

entries.title: Stablecoin treasury and settlement platform Velocity raises $38 million
entries.snippet: Velocity, the stablecoin treasury and settlement platform bringing enterprises onchain, today announced a $38 million Series A round led by Dragonfly and FirstMark, with participation from Activant Capital, Capital One Ventures, QED Investors, Coinbase Ventures, Wintermute Ventures and Ripple.

entries.title: Confirmo targets subscription economy with launch of stablecoin recurring payments
entries.snippet: Confirmo, the stablecoin payment infrastructure provider, has announced Subscribe, enabling enterprise businesses to automate subscription and recurring payments in stablecoins alongside their existing payments stack.
